TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Cedric_Bozeman, title = Cedric_Bozeman, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cedric_Bozeman} }

S.FORM: Cedric Bozeman hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw / praw maki' tayglaing. kawas tay 1983, ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 3, Cedric Bozeman, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Cedric Bozeman hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw / praw maki' tayglaing. kawas tay 1983, ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 3, Cedric Bozeman, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
